---
title: "Schedule"
---

## Workshop and online session overview

| Week | Workshop | Core question |
|------|----------|---------------|
| 1 | Distributions and summarising data | What does a variable actually look like? |
| 2 | Inference | When is a difference real? |
| 3 | Relationships between variables | How do two variables move together — and what does that tell us? |
| 4 | Regression I | What does a coefficient actually measure? |
| 5 | Regression II | What does "controlling for" actually mean? |
| 6 | Choosing your model | When is linear regression the wrong tool? |
| 7 | Understanding your model | Are you controlling for the right things? |
| 8 | Time and data | What goes wrong when observations are not independent? |
| 9 | Experiments and A/B testing | Why does randomisation solve the confounding problem? |
| 10 | When you can't experiment | Can we estimate causal effects without randomisation? |
| 11 | Synthesis and assessment clinic | How do I choose a method — and what are its limits? |

: {tbl-colwidths="[8,30,62]"}

Weekly materials will be added here as the module progresses.
